mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_session WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY update_time DESC
SELECT * FROM chat_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (session_id, sender_type, sender_id, sender_name, content, msg_type, is_read, status, create_time) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{senderType}, #{senderId}, #{senderName}, #{content}, 1, 0, 1, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_message SET status = 2, content = '消息已撤回' WHERE id = #{id} AND sender_type = #{senderType} AND status = 1 AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 MINUTE)
UPDATE chat_session SET admin_id = #{adminId}, admin_name = #{adminName} WHERE id = #{id} AND admin_id IS NULL
UPDATE chat_session SET status = 2 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE chat_message SET is_read = 1 WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND sender_type != #{senderType} AND is_read = 0
UPDATE chat_session SET last_message = #{msg}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
